rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Carin Salter To Produce Documents Requested At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Glenn Lerner's Motion for Order Compelling Carin Salter to Produce Documents Requested at Deposition is DENIED without prejudice. The discovery cut-off has passed, and short of a trial continuance, the court declines to grant the relief sought. The court takes no position on the merits of the motion; and the denial of the motion to compel is without prejudice to seeking appropriate relief at trial. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the ruling shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 2/18/2015.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARIA C SAN MIGUEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion To Quash Notice Of Deposition
rulings.Rulings: The motion to quash is granted. No opposition has been filed, and the deposition notice was not served sufficiently in advance of the deposition date. Petitioner's counsel is ordered to pay Respondent $945 in sanctions. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. on Wednesday, February 18, 2015.
